summary: Windrush disruption may affect Liverpool Street: Severe Delays. Windrush Line: Severe delays between New Cross Gate and West Croydon while we fix a points failure at Norwood Junction. GOOD SERVICE on the rest of the line. Tickets are being accepted on London Underground.
